message:
shared: Fix formatCwdWithTilde to work in CI environments

Use pattern-based detection for home directories so paths like
/Users/philipp/... are converted to ~/... even when running as
a different user (e.g., /Users/runner in CI).

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/2302de04-bad3-4242-9684-8ff51d340f11
